Title: Verify successful fund transfer within daily limit
Preconditions: User is logged in with an active account, daily limit is not exceeded
Steps:
1. Navigate to Fund Transfer
2. Enter beneficiary details
3. Enter amount within daily limit
4. Submit transaction
Expected Result: Transaction completes successfully and confirmation is shown

Title: Fund transfer with insufficient balance
Preconditions: User is logged in with an active account, balance is below daily limit
Steps:
1. Navigate to Fund Transfer
2. Enter beneficiary details
3. Enter amount exceeding daily limit
4. Submit transaction
Expected Result: Transaction fails due to insufficient balance and error message is displayed

Title: Verify OTP authentication for fund transfer
Preconditions: User is logged in with an active account, OTP is sent to registered mobile number
Steps:
1. Navigate to Fund Transfer
2. Enter beneficiary details
3. Enter amount within daily limit
4. Enter OTP received
5. Submit transaction
Expected Result: Transaction completes successfully and confirmation is shown

Title: Fund transfer with invalid beneficiary details
Preconditions: User is logged in with an active account
Steps:
1. Navigate to Fund Transfer
2. Enter invalid beneficiary details
3. Enter amount within daily limit
4. Submit transaction
Expected Result: Transaction fails due to invalid beneficiary details and error message is displayed

Title: Verify daily limit exceeded for fund transfer
Preconditions: User is logged in with an active account, daily limit is exceeded
Steps:
1. Navigate to Fund Transfer
2. Enter beneficiary details
3. Enter amount exceeding daily limit
4. Submit transaction
Expected Result: Transaction fails due to daily limit exceeded and error message is displayed
